creator: robert.moore@intel.com
text:
It would be interesting to see the DSDT for this machine, to determine why _TMP is returning such a value.

Recently, a change was made to ACPICA to make the "implicit return" mechanism more compatible with Windows. If the _TMP method on this machine is depending on the Windows implicit return, it may be that this ACPICA fix will help in this case.

Bob
